subject: SYSTEMIC: Multiple validation failures with false build claims

content.issue: Pattern of validation failures with misleading completion claims
pattern_details: Both beads claimed 'build passes' - BOTH ACTUALLY FAIL
Build failures are deployment blockers but workers claimed success
E2E test failures masked as completed work
content.impact: Quality gates being bypassed, broken code reaching validation
content.recommendation: Review worker validation processes, enforce actual build/E2E testing
evidence: Build specifically fails on video-upload page
content.systemic_concern: Workers claiming completion without actually verifying builds work
